info.title: supernova Blockchain API
info.description: RESTful API for supernova blockchain node with support for environmental impact tracking and the Lightning Network

get.description: Returns detailed information about a block with the specified hash.

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: Block hash

get.description: Returns detailed information about a block at the specified height.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Block height

get.description: Returns general information about the blockchain state.

post.summary: Submit a transaction to the blockchain
post.description: Submits a new transaction to the mempool for validation and broadcasting.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a transaction.

parameters.name: txid
parameters.description: Transaction ID

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in seconds for which to retrieve data (default: 86400 - 1 day)

parameters.name: include_offsets
parameters.description: Whether to include offset information (default: true)

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in seconds for which to retrieve data (default: 3600 - 1 hour)

parameters.name: include_history
parameters.description: Whether to include historical data (default: false)

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in seconds for which to retrieve data (default: 86400 - 1 day)

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Level of detail for the report (default: "standard")

get.description: Returns the current environmental monitoring and optimization settings.

put.description: Updates the environmental monitoring and optimization settings.

post.summary: Open a new Lightning Network channel
post.description: Opens a new payment channel with a remote Lightning Network node.

delete.description: Closes an existing payment channel with a remote Lightning Network node.

get.summary: Get a specific Lightning Network channel
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific Lightning Network channel.

parameters.name: channel_id
parameters.description: Channel ID

parameters.name: include_inactive
parameters.description: Whether to include inactive channels (default: false)

parameters.name: include_pending
parameters.description: Whether to include pending channels (default: true)

get.description: Returns general information about the node's Lightning Network status.

post.description: Creates a new invoice for receiving a payment over the Lightning Network.

parameters.name: pending_only
parameters.description: Whether to include pending invoices (default: true)

parameters.name: index_offset
parameters.description: Optional invoice index to start from

parameters.name: num_max_invoices
parameters.description: Maximum number of invoices to retrieve (default: 100)

get.summary: Get information about a specific Lightning Network node
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific node in the Lightning Network.

parameters.name: node_id
parameters.description: Node ID (public key)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Optional limit for the number of nodes to return (default: 100)

post.description: Sends a payment over the Lightning Network.

parameters.name: index_offset
parameters.description: Optional payment index to start from

parameters.name: max_payments
parameters.description: Maximum number of payments to retrieve (default: 100)

parameters.name: include_pending
parameters.description: Whether to include pending payments (default: true)

parameters.name: pub_key
parameters.description: Destination node ID (public key)

parameters.name: amt_mnova
parameters.description: Amount to send in millinova

parameters.name: fee_limit_mnova
parameters.description: Maximum fee in millinova (default: 10000)

parameters.name: target_blocks
parameters.description: Target number of blocks for confirmation (default: 6)

get.description: Returns general information about the mempool.

post.summary: Submit a transaction to the mempool
post.description: Submits a new transaction to the mempool for validation and broadcasting.

get.summary: Get a specific transaction from the mempool
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific transaction in the mempool.

parameters.name: txid
parameters.description: Transaction ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to retrieve (default: 100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination (default: 0)

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Whether to include verbose transaction details (default: false)

post.description: Validates a transaction without adding it to the mempool.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in seconds (default: 3600)

get.description: Returns the current status of the mining operation.

post.description: Submits a solved block to the network.

parameters.name: capabilities
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of capabilities (default: "standard")

parameters.name: max_transactions
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to include (default: all available)

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in seconds (default: 3600)

get.description: Returns the number of connections by type.
Returns information about the node's network status.

parameters.name: connection_state
parameters.description: Optional connection state filter

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Include detailed information (default: false)

post.description: Attempts to connect to a new peer by address.

get.summary: Get information about a specific peer
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific connected peer.

parameters.name: peer_id
parameters.description: Peer ID

parameters.name: peer_id
parameters.description: Peer ID

get.description: Returns basic information about the node including version, network, and status

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Log level filter

parameters.name: component
parameters.description: Component filter

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of logs to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in seconds

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in seconds for which to retrieve data (default: 3600 - 1 hour)

error.description: Error message (only present if success is false)

BlockHashParams.description: Block hash parameter for API requests

BlockHeightParams.description: Block height parameter for API requests

net_emissions_g.description: Net carbon emissions after offsets in grams of CO2e

offsets.description: List of carbon offsets applied (if any)

period.description: Time period in seconds that this data covers

renewable_percentage.description: Percentage of energy from renewable sources

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this data was generated

total_emissions_g.description: Total carbon emissions in grams of CO2e

efficiency.description: Energy efficiency metric (kWh per resource utilization unit)

period.description: Time period in seconds that this data covers

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this data was generated

carbon_emissions_g_per_hour.description: Current carbon emissions in grams CO2e per hour

carbon_offsets_tons.description: Carbon offsets purchased in tons CO2e

is_carbon_negative.description: Whether the node is carbon negative

carbon_offset_enabled.description: Whether carbon offset mechanism is enabled

data_retention_days.description: Number of days to retain environmental data

energy_efficiency_target.description: Target energy efficiency (kWh per resource unit)

location_code.description: Geographic location code for emissions calculation

power_saving_mode.description: Whether power saving mode is enabled

renewable_energy_percentage.description: Percentage of energy from renewable sources (if known)

fee_rate_ppm.description: Fee rate in parts per million

local_reserve_nova.description: Local channel reserve in nova units

remote_reserve_nova.description: Remote channel reserve in nova units

limit.description: Maximum number of logs to return

total_size.description: Total size of mempool in bytes

fee_rate.description: Fee rate in nova units per byte

time.description: Time when transaction was added to mempool

accepts_incoming.description: Whether the node accepts inbound connections

download_rate.description: Download rate in bytes per second

upload_rate.description: Upload rate in bytes per second

local_funding_amount.description: Local funding amount in nova units

private.description: Whether to make the channel private

amount_mnova.description: Amount in millinova (optional, can override invoice amount)

success.description: Whether the peer was added successfully

period.description: Time period in seconds that this data covers

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this data was generated

StartMiningRequest.description:
Start mining

Starts the mining operation.

threads.description: Number of threads to use for mining (default: use system-determined optimal value)

raw_tx.description: Raw transaction data in hex format

high_priority.description: High priority fee rate (nova units per byte)

low_priority.description: Low priority fee rate (nova units per byte)

normal_priority.description: Normal priority fee rate (nova units per byte)

target_blocks.description: Target number of blocks for confirmation

block_hash.description: Block hash containing this transaction (if confirmed)

block_height.description: Block height containing this transaction (if confirmed)

value.description: Previous output value in nova units

spent.description: Whether this output has been spent

spent_by_tx.description: Transaction ID of spending transaction (if spent)

fee_rate.description: Fee rate in nova units per byte

TxHashParams.description: Transaction hash parameter for API requests
